🐸 SlimeWire Sprite Forge

Free HD sprite generator powered by Puter.js (no API key, no credits). It renders each creature on a magenta key-screen, auto-cuts it to a transparent PNG, and downloads it with the exact filename the game expects. Generate all → Download all → drop the PNGs into web/public/assets/slimewire/swamp/sprites/.

Step 1: click “Sign in to Puter” (free account, you pay nothing — it’s the user-pays model).
📥 Import mode (works with ANY generator — no Puter needed)

Generate the sprites on a free tool (Bing Image Creator, Leonardo.ai, etc.) using the prompt pack — each prompt asks for a solid magenta background. Save the PNGs, then drop them here. This page cuts the magenta to transparent, autocrops, resizes to 512px, and lets you Download All as a correctly-named zip.
